risk_inputs.note: Risk inputs are screening inputs only; portfolio-risk-management must still verify downside, liquidity, and implementation readiness.

model_portfolio_inputs.sizing_formula: min(single-name cap, risk budget / downside_or_stop_distance, liquidity cap)
model_portfolio_inputs.note: Screen size is an input only; final sizing requires portfolio-risk-management.

risk_context.next_step: Run Public Equity Investing portfolio-risk-management before treating downside, liquidity, or sizing as implementation-ready.

investment_horizon.near_term_3m: Inventory-scope artifact uses health-check, K-line, and APEX context as a timing/risk screen only; 3-month thesis is not fully underwritten.
investment_horizon.base_12m: Requires official filings, earnings-call commentary, consensus/estimate context, and valuation work before a 12-month PEI view can be decision-ready.
investment_horizon.long_term_3y: Requires full PEI specialist research or source-backed industry/company underwrite before a 3-year ownership thesis can be decision-ready.
falsifiers: Official revenue, margin, EPS, cash-flow, order, or management commentary weakens the thesis.
Current valuation already prices the optimistic case without margin of safety.
Liquidity, downside distance, or risk budget cannot support model-portfolio sizing.

stock_inventory_context.health_check_reason: 近一週賣點、權重集中或資料限制，使盤前風控優先於加碼。
stock_inventory_context.short_term_scenario: APEX 未取得可靠 numeric stop threshold；本輪 watchlist upsert skipped，不覆蓋 Stock Industry/技術風控。
stock_inventory_context.invalidation_condition: 若 Stock Industry thesis 下修、估值/財報證據轉弱，或後續 APEX 補出明確失效價跌破，需重估。
stock_inventory_context.data_limitations: 庫存合併 2026-07-15；TW K線窗 2026-07-08~2026-07-14；US K線窗 2026-07-07~2026-07-13；industry thesis 2026-07-15 no-network；Stock Industry cache valid。

portfolio_risk.model_portfolio_size: 0%; watch only until thesis and risk evidence improve
portfolio_risk.downside_or_stop_distance: 20d_low distance 4%; 20D low 648 (input only; PM must verify)
portfolio_risk.liquidity_cap: 20D avg trade value 960,886,331.85; PM must define liquidity cap
portfolio_risk.hedge_posture: No hedge; model portfolio remains cash for this name until evidence clears
portfolio_risk.add_rule: Open or add only after full PEI specialist workflow confirms thesis, trigger, price context, liquidity, and risk/reward
portfolio_risk.trim_rule: 近一週賣點、權重集中或資料限制，使盤前風控優先於加碼。
portfolio_risk.exit_rule: 若 Stock Industry thesis 下修、估值/財報證據轉弱，或後續 APEX 補出明確失效價跌破，需重估。
portfolio_risk.max_loss_posture: 0 units at risk because inventory-scope model size is 0%
portfolio_risk.monitoring_cadence: Daily price and weekly fundamentals while held in inventory watch universe
